claim.summary: Re-run contact mask pixel QA against the same canonical Main Flow hash confirmed stable provisional status: actor-hand fallback edges remain geometrically passable, while named per-hand edges and actor-body collision remain blocked due to zero-off per-hand split masks and node 1009 body mask.

inputs.prompt_text: Local spatial truth revalidation for strict body-contact mask edges.

settings.runtime_required: current-hash runtime validation still required before acceptance
settings.model_effort_context: critical-mode documentation handoff and evidence normalization only

runtime.lane2_runtime_action: no live ComfyUI execution; local pixel metrics only

artifacts.description: Re-run pixel QA artifact showing unchanged provisional pass/blocked contact edges.
Reusable local mask/depth QA utility used for this revalidation.
Active Lane 1 request defining provisional preflight thresholds and blockers.
Outstanding runtime acceptance request for strict body-contact semantics.

checks.name: provisional_fallback_edges
checks.notes: Fallback actor-hand-to-receiver butt and breast edge checks still meet overlap/contact-zone targets in the local preflight.

checks.name: named_per_hand_edges
checks.notes: Left/right named edges remain blocked because both named hand split masks are zero/off placeholders.

checks.name: per_hand_split_feasibility
checks.notes: Combined actor-hand mask cannot be truthfully split into reliable Character A/B left-right masks from current scene references.

checks.name: actor_body_collision
checks.notes: character_b_body_mask remains zero/off and cannot support full body collision/deformation checks.

checks.name: runtime_visual_validation
checks.notes: No live ComfyUI execution was performed in this lane.

failure_reasons: Named left/right per-hand contact-pair quality remains blocked by same-scene zero/off masks.
Full actor-body collision/deformation validation remains blocked by node 1009 source.

blockers.description: Per-hand split inputs remain zero/off placeholders.
blockers.next_action: Deliver same-scene nonzero character_b_left_hand and character_b_right_hand masks (and optional A-side hand masks) before lifting named edge blockers.
Provide trusted actor-body source for full collision/deformation checks or keep actor-body collision disabled.

blockers.description: Local QA does not include rendered depth ordering or hand anatomy acceptance.
blockers.next_action: Lane 4 should run approved runtime handoff and Lane 5 should review visual outputs for final acceptance.
